name: Banana Blueberry Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Set aside.
3. Cream the butter and gradually beat in sugar until light and fluffy.
4. Beat in eggs one at a time.
5. Add the flour mixture and mashed bananas alternately in three parts.
6. Gently stir in the blueberries.
7. Turn batter into an oiled 9 x 5-inch loaf pan.
8. Bake at 350 degrees for 50 minutes.
9. Turn out of pan to cool.
